chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-5799 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on Misc. No. 25717 of 2024. 2. For orders on office objections No. 6, 22, 23 & 29. 3. For orders on Misc. No. 25718 of 2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 19-11-2024 Mr. Javed Ahmed Kalwar, Advocate for the Petitioner. ********** 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. The Petitioner was awarded major penalty of compulsory retirement against which he preferred a departmental appeal. Apparently, that appeal was dismissed and the Petitioner made an application for review. Learned counsel submits that the Petitioner is not aware of the decision of the review application. Nonetheless, against the dismissal of departmental appeal, the remedy of the Petitioner was before the Sindh Service Tribunal as he is a civil servant. Therefore, the office objection is upheld. The petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE *PA/SADAM
